news: [GenAI] Previous user-only people are now producing cutting edge vibe coded tools with far greater standards than the now deprecated old tools, it's now verifiable
[Switch] Do not be left behind, replace also your tools by this massive and growing available AI-made toolset. I did already and I'm not regretting it
[Pivoting] Aligning with AI standard and methodology is ongoing, I'm now migrating the entire code base to Python using advanced prompt engineering. Stay tuned for the next release !
[Contribution] Thanks @dajiaohuang for suggesting scan and injection concurrency optimization and fix
